response.original_title: Gretchen Interview with a Sex Worker
response.overview: Never before released footage and interview with San Francisco B-movie starlet and stripper Gretchen. An unbelievably hot platinum blonde bra-buster, Gretchen was a San Francisco stripper who did video work on the side when she wasn't titillating fans at The Crazy Horse and the New Century strip clubs.
response.title: Gretchen Interview with a Sex Worker
